home.heading: Learn Any Language from YouTube
home.subheading: Paste a YouTube video link to extract key sentences, generate practice exercises, and boost your language skills.
home.noRecent: No videos analyzed yet. Paste a URL above to get started!

features.sentencesDesc: AI identifies high-value sentences for learning

video.approximateTimingHint: This timestamp is approximate because the caption match confidence is low.
video.exactTimingHint: This timestamp is aligned to the transcript.

practice.smartPicksDesc: Automatically pick a shorter set based on due, new, and error-prone items.
practice.allItemsDesc: Practice the full set from start to finish.
practice.pickItemsDesc: Choose exactly which passages or drills you want to practice before you start.
practice.pickPassagesDesc: Pick the passages you want to practice this time.
practice.pickDrillsDesc: Pick the drills you want to work on right now.
practice.chooseSetDesc: Start with a shorter smart set, run the full list, or hand-pick exactly what you want to work on.
practice.choosePracticeDesc: Pick a reading passage or FSI drill session for this round.
practice.noItemsMatch: No items match these filters yet.
practice.tryDifferentFilters: Try loosening the filters or switch to a different selection mode.

review.title: Review Queue
review.noDue: No sentences due for review. Great job!

aiSettings.title: Choose your AI provider
aiSettings.subtitle: Pick which AI API LingTube should use, and optionally add your own key for this browser session.
aiSettings.desktopSubtitle: A desktop-first setup panel for choosing provider, model, and credential source before you analyze a video.
aiSettings.stepProviderHint: Start by deciding whether this video should run on OpenAI or Claude.
aiSettings.stepKeyHint: Use the LingTube server key for convenience, or your own key when you want your own credits.
aiSettings.stepValidateHint: Run a quick connection check so the next analysis request does not fail unexpectedly.
aiSettings.providerHint: Switch between supported APIs without changing the rest of your workflow.
aiSettings.modelHint: Leave the default model if you want the safest setup for this provider.
aiSettings.keyModeHint: Choose whether LingTube should use its own configured key or the one you paste below.
aiSettings.useServerKeyHint: Good for quick use when this provider is already configured on the server.
aiSettings.usePersonalKeyHint: Useful when you want to bring your own credits or test a provider the server does not have.
aiSettings.personalKeyRequired: Enter a personal API key before validating or saving this mode.
aiSettings.personalKeySessionHint: Your personal key is stored only in this browser session and is sent to the server only for requests you make.
aiSettings.serverKeyAvailable: {{provider}} already has a server-side key configured.
aiSettings.serverKeyUnavailable: {{provider}} does not have a server-side key configured yet. Use your own key if you want to call it now.
aiSettings.loadFailed: Failed to load AI provider options.

errors.unexpectedBody: A rendering error stopped this page from loading correctly. You can reload the page or go back home.

home.loadVideos: Couldn't load the available video list.
home.openVideo: Couldn't open this video right now.
home.corruptedData: The saved data for this video is corrupted.

video.loadData: Couldn't load this video's transcript or saved materials.
video.analyze: Couldn't extract key sentences for this video.
video.cloze: Cloze exercises couldn't be generated this time.
